title: Add auth + middleware test coverage
description:
tests/health.test.ts is the only test in the repo. The auth flow is the highest-leverage surface (it gates every protected endpoint), but has zero coverage.

Add:
- tests/auth.service.test.ts covering register (success, duplicate email, first user becomes SUPER_ADMIN), login (success, bad password, inactive account), refresh (rotation, revocation), logout (revokes refresh token), logoutAll (revokes all user tokens).
- tests/auth.middleware.test.ts covering authenticate (JWT valid/invalid/expired/missing, API key valid/invalid/expired), requireRole (grants admin, denies user), requireOwnerOrAdmin.
- tests/lib/jwt.test.ts covering signAccessToken / signRefreshToken / verifyAccessToken / verifyRefreshToken — invalid signature, wrong audience/issuer, expired, type mismatch.

Mock Prisma and Redis with vi.mock() the same way tests/health.test.ts does. Run Scope: all 8 workspace projects

title: Implement webhook delivery worker + lifecycle trigger
description:
WEBHOOK_DELIVERY queue + enqueueWebhook() exist, but no worker consumes the queue and nothing calls enqueueWebhook. The webhookUrl column on Session is non-functional.

Add:
- infrastructure/queue/workers/webhook.worker.ts that POSTs JSON to the session.webhookUrl with HMAC-SHA256 signature header (X-Nexora-Signature: sha256=<hex>) computed from  using a WEBHOOK_SIGNING_SECRET env var.
- Wire createWebhookWorkers into bootstrap (src/index.ts) alongside session workers.
- Wire enqueueWebhook() from the session-events.service when an event is logged AND a webhookUrl is set on the session.
- Update src/index.ts SIGTERM handler to close all workers (currently only Baileys sessions close).
- Add WEBHOOK_SIGNING_SECRET to env.ts and .env.example.
- Add WEBHOOK_TIMEOUT_MS (default 10000) and WEBHOOK_MAX_RETRIES (default 5) to env.

Acceptance: A session with webhookUrl set receives POSTs at that URL with a valid signature header when its lifecycle events fire; typecheck passes.

title: Wire SessionEvent persistence and emit from engine
description:
The SessionEvent Prisma model and the GET /sessions/:id/events endpoint exist, but nothing in the codebase ever calls prisma.sessionEvent.create. The events stream is empty.

Add:
- modules/sessions/session-events.repository.ts (insert, findMany, count)
- modules/sessions/session-events.service.ts (log(sessionId, type, payload?))
- Wire log() calls from engine/baileys.session.ts on every status/QR/pairing/message event:
  - handleConnectionUpdate → connection.update, qr.update, connected, disconnected, error
  - requestPairingCode → pairing.code
  - messages.upsert → message.received
- Wire log() from sessions.service.ts on createSession + deleteSession (session.created / session.deleted)
- Resolve the existing  filter to match SessionEventType enum from engine/types.ts.

Acceptance: GET /sessions/:id/events returns the lifecycle events after a session has been started; typecheck passes.

title: Remove dead code: legacy routes, unused helpers, orphan env var
description:
Phase-1 scaffolding left orphaned files and helpers that aren't referenced anywhere. Remove:
- artifacts/api-server/src/routes/index.ts and routes/health.ts (both  with 'Legacy file' comments)
- scripts/src/hello.ts (placeholder, never invoked)
- cacheGet/cacheSet/cacheDel helpers in infrastructure/redis.ts (never imported)
- ENCRYPTION_KEY from .env.example (declared but never read — no encryption layer exists)
- forgotPasswordSchema/resetPasswordSchema from modules/auth/auth.schema.ts (no controller/service/route uses them)
Fix scripts/post-merge.sh to run prisma migrate deploy instead of Scope: all 8 workspace projects
